Medicaid Number CHAR 15 State facility provider number.
71 AA6B AA6B_FAC_MCARE_NBR (AA6B) Facility Medicare Number CHAR 12 Federal facility provider number.
72 AA8A AA8A_PRI_RFA (AA8A) Primary Reason for Assessment CHAR 2 Primary reason for assessment 01 = Admission Assessment (required by day 14), 02 = Annual Assessment, 03 = Significant change in status assessment, 04 = Significant correction to full prior assessment, 05 = Quarterly review assessment, 06 = Discharged - return not anticipated,
